void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountListRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(count($document_IN_PORT/AccountListRp/ListAccount/ListAccountDetail))<=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="'124'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountListRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountListRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <ListAccount> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountListRp/ListAccount/ListAccountDetail"> <ListAccountDetail> <AccountNo> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountNo"></xsl:value-of> </AccountNo> <AccountCcy> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountCcy"></xsl:value-of> </AccountCcy> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountBalance"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> <AccountBalanceAvaliable> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountBalanceAvaliable"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalanceAvaliable> <AccountType> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountType"></xsl:value-of> </AccountType> <AccountJoinCode> <xsl:value-of select="./AccountJoinCode"></xsl:value-of> </AccountJoinCode> <BranchCode> <xsl:value-of select="./BranchCode"></xsl:value-of> </BranchCode> <CustomerRole> <xsl:value-of select="./CustomerRole"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerRole> </ListAccountDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListAccount> </AccountListRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountListRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ListAccount"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ListAccountDetail" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountCcy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalanceAvaliable" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountJoinCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="BranchCode" type="xsd:string"/>` <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerRole" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountListRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ListAccount"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ListAccountDetail" minOccurs="1" maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountCcy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountBalanceAvaliable" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="AccountJoinCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="BranchCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerRole" type="xsd:string"/>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element>
</xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
